alkylation reagent: alkylated (10 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature for 15 min)
alkylation concentration: alkylated (10 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature for 15 min)
cleavage agent: enzymatically hydrolyzed (2 µg trypsin solution at room temperature for 5 min)
labeling: Label-free quantification of proteins in the colons of UC mice
reduction reagent: reduced (5 mM TCEP at 55°C for 10 min)
reduction concentration: reduced (5 mM TCEP at 55°C for 10 min)
